title: alternanthera sessilis var. tenuissima
intro: Alternanthera sessilis var. tenuissima, also known as 'False Daisy' or 'Small Leaf Joyweed', is a species of plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to help with wound healing and reducing fever. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Alternanthera sessilis var. tenuissima is often made into a tea or decoction, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
